meta.defaultDescription: Personal website of Ali Kemal Nezir, a Project Manager with 10+ years of experience in IT projects, healthcare informatics, critical infrastructure and digital transformation.

hero.title: Delivering Complex IT and Infrastructure Projects
hero.subtitle: For over 10 years, I have been creating value for organizations in healthcare informatics, critical infrastructure and digital transformation projects — from end-to-end project management to PMO setup and operational process improvement.

intro.title: About Me
intro.body: I am a PMP-certified Project Manager. Throughout my career, I have taken responsibility in ICT project management, HIS integration, data center operations and team leadership across large-scale healthcare institutions and critical infrastructure projects. I combine Agile and traditional project management approaches to bridge the gap between technical teams and executive management.

cookieModal.title: Cookie Preferences
cookieModal.description: Necessary cookies are always active for the site to function. You can turn other categories on or off as you wish.
cookieModal.necessaryDescription: Required for the site's core functions, cannot be disabled.
cookieModal.analyticsDescription: Allow us to anonymously analyze visitor behavior via Google Analytics (GA4) and Microsoft Clarity.
cookieModal.advertisingDescription: Allow advertising providers such as Google AdSense to show you relevant ads.
cookieModal.marketingDescription: Used to personalize newsletter subscriptions and marketing communications.
